message:
feat(daemon): Add resource management module for nice/ionice/threads

Implements bd-ld7m: Resource management to make the daemon a good citizen.

Features:
- CPU nice level via renice command (Linux/macOS)
- I/O priority via ionice command (Linux)
- Thread pool bounding for rayon
- Memory monitoring via /proc/meminfo (Linux) and vm_stat (macOS)
- TOML config file support (~/.config/xf/daemon.toml)
- Environment variable overrides (XF_DAEMON_*)

Resource settings are applied at daemon startup before binding the socket.
Uses safe command invocation instead of unsafe syscalls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -80,6 +80,7 @@ safetensors = "0.5"     # Read Model2Vec embedding weights from safetensors form
 rayon = "1.10"
 crossbeam-channel = "0.5"
 parking_lot = "0.12"
+num_cpus = "1.16"
 
 # Utilities
 chrono = { version = "0.4", default-features = false, features = ["std", "clock", "serde"] }
